status_semantics.planned: Approved for a later bounded adaptation; no project-local implementation yet.
status_semantics.ported: A project-local adaptation or clean-room interface exists; this status alone does not claim test coverage.
status_semantics.tested: The project-local module exists and has passed its declared smoke/unit coverage.
status_semantics.rejected: Direct source port is not allowed or not compatible with the current environment.

global_rules: No production import may resolve into an adjacent repository.
No complete upstream directory is copied.
Only permissively licensed, small, identified source units may be adapted.
A clean-room implementation records architectural inspiration but does not copy source text.
PointDSC source is reference-only because this checkout has no repository-level license grant.
Native extension ports are rejected for iteration one.

modules.purpose: Symmetric self-attention followed by bidirectional cross-attention for observed/template tokens.
modules.strategy: clean-room adaptation using torch.nn.MultiheadAttention with batch-first masks
changes: Removed RegTR package registry and KPConv coupling.
Changed sequence layout to batch-first padded tensors.
Made validity masks explicit and device-agnostic.
Did not include RegTR weighted pose solver in inference.

modules.purpose: Auxiliary overlap logits and template-coordinate correspondence predictions.
modules.strategy: clean-room heads matching the project output contract
changes: Split upstream combined decoder into registry modules.
Use soft template matching plus a bounded learned residual.
Return padded-mask-aware outputs and no mandatory numerical pose solver.

modules.purpose: Upstream local point encoder and preprocessing.
modules.strategy: Do not port; use SimplePointEncoder in iteration one.
modules.rejection_reason: Requires MinkowskiEngine, pytorch3d and C++ wrappers that are absent and unnecessary for the baseline.

modules.purpose: Rotation/translation-invariant geometric context for point tokens.
modules.strategy: clean-room reduced embedding suitable for bounded variable-size smoke batches
changes: Use per-point local distance statistics instead of the upstream O(N^2 k) triplet tensor.
Use project-local kNN and explicit valid masks.
Remain pure PyTorch and CPU/CUDA device agnostic.
Remove hard-coded CUDA allocations.
Support padded masks and batched feature tensors.
Return a dense differentiable score matrix instead of top-k index tuples.

modules.purpose: Log-domain Sinkhorn normalization with an optional learned dustbin.
changes: Replace all .cuda() allocations with input-derived device/dtype.
Use explicit row/column validity masks.
Avoid importing the GeoTransformer extension package.

modules.strategy: Do not port or compile in iteration one.
modules.rejection_reason: Upstream declares CUDAExtension, nvcc is absent, and project-local pure torch point operations cover smoke-scale needs.

modules.purpose: Point-pair distance and three normal/offset angular features.
changes: Remove Open3D normal estimation and NumPy runtime paths.
Accept already-associated point/normal tensors.
Use clamped normalized dot products for stable angles.

modules.strategy: clean-room project interface; not enabled in baseline
changes: Replace pointops neighborhood construction with caller-provided pair features.
Express PPF influence as a learned attention bias.
Avoid CUDA extension and Open3D dependencies.

modules.purpose: CUDA sampling, kNN/grouping, interpolation and aggregation.
modules.strategy: Do not port or load checked-in binaries.
modules.rejection_reason: Binaries target CPython 3.7/3.8 and source requires CUDA compilation; pure torch operations are sufficient for iteration one.

modules.purpose: Learnable query slots, decoder intermediates, no-pose logits and auxiliary predictions.
changes: Decode 6D rotations, translations, logits and uncertainty instead of boxes/classes.
Use point-token memory masks and batch-first tensors.
Retain intermediate decoder outputs for auxiliary losses.

modules.purpose: One-to-one matching of K pose queries to admissible GT hypotheses.
changes: Remove SciPy and box-specific cost terms.
Accept an already-computed rectangular pose cost matrix.
Use an augmenting-path implementation that remains practical for K=8 and SO2 samples G=36.

modules.purpose: Per-observed-point confidence/importance logits for correspondence diagnostics and loss weighting.
changes: Remove DCP, PyTorch3D, PyG and dual-flow pose-solver coupling.
Return raw masked logits rather than concatenated flow-plus-weight tensors.

modules.strategy: Register an explicit unavailable placeholder; no upstream model source is ported in iteration one.
modules.rejection_reason: The standalone model requires missing addict, spconv, torch_scatter and timm; CUDA 13 compatibility is unverified.

modules.purpose: Reference packed-point semantics, serialization, pooling and PTv3 blocks.
modules.strategy: Reference only; current PackedPointBatch is an independent project data contract.
modules.rejection_reason: Pointcept targets torch 2.5/CUDA 12.4 and requires spconv, torch_scatter plus multiple unbuilt C++/CUDA libraries.

modules.strategy: clean-room interface only; deliberately excluded from baseline config
changes: Expose learned saliency top-k selection without GeoTransformer neighbor metadata.
Do not port fine-scale focus integration or native operations.

modules.purpose: Grid/radius ops and CUDA chamfer distance.
modules.rejection_reason: Legacy CPython 3.8 binary, missing nvcc/einops, and not required by the iteration-one baseline.

modules.strategy: Reject source port; target is an independent formula-level clean-room interface and contains no copied source.
modules.rejection_reason: No repository-level license or README grant was found.
Unlicensed prebuilt binary without corresponding source in this checkout; also unnecessary for the baseline.
